---
title: "Old Sir Douglas"
---

## Old Sir Douglas

**Author:** Caroline Norton
**Date:** 1868
**Imprint:** London: Hurst & Blackett

### Notes

Originally serialized in <i>Macmillan’s Magazine</i> from January to May 1866, and from September 1866 to October 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
